content:
# GitHub Primer - Overview

Page type: developer_tool
Use cases: developer tool sidebar, repository settings, admin navigation, docs product navigation
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://primer.style/product/components/nav-list/

Visual traits:
- vertical
- contextual
- compact
- hierarchical
- developer-focused

Use when:
- developer tool sidebar
- repository settings
- admin navigation
- docs product navigation

Avoid when:
- marketing top nav
- deep file explorer tree
- mobile bottom nav

AI summary: Use Primer NavList for developer/admin sidebars: vertical contextual links, active state via aria-current, grouped sections, limited nesting, and optional leading icons.

# GitHub Primer - Layout Rules

Page type: developer_tool
Use cases: developer tool sidebar, repository settings, admin navigation, docs product navigation
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://primer.style/product/components/nav-list/

- Use vertical nav for the current context and mark the active view clearly.
- Group long lists into named sections or use dividers for visual grouping.
- Limit nested navigation depth; reconsider IA if more than a few levels are needed.

AI summary: Use Primer NavList for developer/admin sidebars: vertical contextual links, active state via aria-current, grouped sections, limited nesting, and optional leading icons.

# GitHub Primer - Component Patterns

Page type: developer_tool
Use cases: developer tool sidebar, repository settings, admin navigation, docs product navigation
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://primer.style/product/components/nav-list/

- nav list
- nav item
- group
- subnav
- leading visual
- aria-current

AI summary: Use Primer NavList for developer/admin sidebars: vertical contextual links, active state via aria-current, grouped sections, limited nesting, and optional leading icons.

# GitHub Primer - Interaction States

Page type: developer_tool
Use cases: developer tool sidebar, repository settings, admin navigation, docs product navigation
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://primer.style/product/components/nav-list/

- current page
- expanded
- collapsed
- hover
- focus

AI summary: Use Primer NavList for developer/admin sidebars: vertical contextual links, active state via aria-current, grouped sections, limited nesting, and optional leading icons.

# GitHub Primer - Accessibility Notes

Page type: developer_tool
Use cases: developer tool sidebar, repository settings, admin navigation, docs product navigation
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://primer.style/product/components/nav-list/

- Use aria-current for the active item.
- Do not replace navigation with a tree view when semantic navigation is needed.

AI summary: Use Primer NavList for developer/admin sidebars: vertical contextual links, active state via aria-current, grouped sections, limited nesting, and optional leading icons.

# GitHub Primer - Implementation Hints

Page type: developer_tool
Use cases: developer tool sidebar, repository settings, admin navigation, docs product navigation
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://primer.style/product/components/nav-list/

- Use for GitHub-like sidebars in developer tools and admin settings.
- Icons should clarify destinations, not add noise.

AI summary: Use Primer NavList for developer/admin sidebars: vertical contextual links, active state via aria-current, grouped sections, limited nesting, and optional leading icons.
